meta.title: fak product-concept scorecard — durable / real / useful-today
meta._doc: Each row is one fak product concept (a CLAIMS.md '##' section), scored on whether a PERSON can pick it up and use it today. The scorecard cross-checks every row against the real tree (the CLAIMS tag the concept carries, whether the first command's cmd dir + verb resolve, whether the witness/entry paths exist), so the score cannot be gamed by editing data alone. Regenerate the doc: python tools/product_scorecard.py --markdown-dir docs/product-scorecard
